name: Restaurante Smoix
description: The only restaurant in Menorca with a Bib Gourmand distinction from the Michelin Guide, in the heart of Ciutadella. Mediterranean cooking built on local produce, with refined technique and international touches, from chef Germán Blanch.

highlights: the only Bib Gourmand table in the Michelin Guide on Menorca
Mediterranean cooking of organic, seasonal produce
book ahead, right in the centre of Ciutadella
